check git diff for it

content.text:
Based on the edit just made, the diff is:

```diff
--- a/src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts
+++ b/src/modules/rest/frequently-bought-together/frequently-bought-together.controller.ts
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
         responseFormatter: (res: FrequentlyBoughtTogetherResponseDto) => ({
-            count: res.frequently_bought_together.length,
+            count: res.frequently_bought_together?.length ?? null,
             fallbackUsed: res.fallback_used,
         }),
```

Note: only the **first** `responseFormatter` (v1 endpoint) was patched. Lines 71 and 103 (root-categories and v2) still have the unguarded `.length` — those need the same fix.
